name: Pickle N Par Club (Melville)
about: Pickle N Par Club is a state-of-the-art facility offering indoor pickleball courts and simulated golf experiences. It operates two locations in New York, one in Melville and another in Smithtown. The venue allows members to book time on its golf simulators and pickleball courts, with members able to reserve 15 days in advance. The facility caters to various skill levels and is designed for both casual practice and serious play. The golf simulators are provided by Full Swing, a premium brand in the industry.
why_golfers_like_it: Full Swing golf simulators provide data-driven practice for improved on-course performance
Members can book simulators up to 15 days in advance, offering significant convenience
The technology is used by PGA professionals, indicating a high-quality simulation experience
Ability to play up to 4 players on a single simulator bay, great for social and group play

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen available for food service
No mention of alcohol service; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium golf simulator brand used by PGA professionals like Jason Day

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify if clubs are provided. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the golf simulation experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The facility has an on-site kitchen, but does not explicitly state if outside food and drinks are permitted. The BYOB policy is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for playing 18 holes on the simulator. Time may vary based on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Pickle N Par Club is kid-friendly, offering pickleball lessons and activities suitable for younger players, with certified instructors for instruction.
